caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, black headphones, and a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" in gold lettering sits at a desk. He is gesturing with his hands while speaking into a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. He wears a gold watch on his left wrist. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a logo with five gold stars and the words "UNIQUE HUSTLE" repeated vertically. To the right of the man, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk, a small black object and a white mug with red and blue text that includes "TALK OUT" are visible. A small logo in the bottom-left corner says "T-SQUARE". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, shifting his facial expression and hand gestures as he continues to speak, while the camera angle and background remain static.
